title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1978 (03.07.1978)
text: REGISTERED NO. D. (D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II-Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 200] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JULY 3, 1978/ASADHA 12, 1900 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. (579) 368 GI/78 -- 1 of 2 -- 580 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Sec. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION NJA> D;lhi, ths 3rd July, 1978 G.S.R, 353(K) .—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (J5 of 1967), the Central Government makes the following rules fun her to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely :— (1) These rules may lie called the Passpms (Amendment) Rules 197S. (2) In Schedule 1 to the Passport Rules, 1967- (i) against serial No. 7 in column 3, for the existing entry, the following entry shall be substituted, namely:— "The State of Tamil Nadu and the Union Territory of Pondicherry"; <ii) after serial No. 12, the following shall be inserted, namely: — "I3.(a) Regional Passport Offi- The State of Kama- cer.
